game_info.title: "The First Trial",
game_info.concept: **Danganronpa: Trigger Happy Hav**: Danganronpa: Trigger Happy Havoc unfolds across a linear narrative divided into chapters, each featuring distinct Investigation and Class Trial phases. During Investigation, players navigate 2.5D environments using tap-to-move controls or a virtual joystick, interacting with characters and objects by tapping to collect "Truth Bullets" (evidence) and testimonies. The subsequent Class Trial phase is a "High Speed Deductive Action" sequence where players use collected Truth Bullets to "shoot down" contradictory statements from other characters, typically via a timing-based minigame where players tap to fire the correct evidence at highlighted text. Successfully identifying the culprit and presenting conclusive evidence allows progression to the next chapter, while incorrect deductions or failures in minigames result in a game over. Progression also unlocks entries in the Intimacy Gallery for replaying character events and the Character Gallery for viewing sprites and lines.
game_info.description: You're trapped in a mysterious school trial! Navigate through crime scenes to collect Truth Bullets (evidence), then use them in fast-paced Class Trials to shoot down contradictory statements. Successfully identify the culprit by matching evidence to lies before time runs out. Each chapter increases in difficulty with more complex testimonies and faster statements. Fail to catch all lies or run out of time, and it's game over!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate character during Investigation phase
Space: Interact with objects/characters to collect Truth Bullets
Z: Fire Truth Bullets at contradictory statements during Class Trial
Shift: Slow down time briefly during Class Trial (limited uses)
Enter: Start game from main menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and interaction mechanics during the Investigation phase. Validates that the player can navigate the environment and collect Truth Bullets correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player character systematically through the investigation area using arrow keys. Interact with all available evidence points using Space to collect Truth Bullets. Verify that collected evidence is properly stored in the game state.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: All Truth Bullets in the current chapter should be collected. The game should transition to the Class Trial phase once all evidence is gathered. Player position should update correctly with movement inputs.

TEST_1.expected: All Truth Bullets in the current chapter should be collected. The game should transition to the Class Trial phase once all evidence is gathered. Player position should update correctly with movement inputs.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete win condition by playing through a full chapter optimally. This validates evidence collection, Class Trial mechanics, and chapter progression.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Efficiently collect all Truth Bullets during Investigation. During Class Trial, identify contradictory statements and fire the correct Truth Bullet at the right moment using Z. Use time-slow ability strategically when needed. Complete all chapters to reach victory.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete all chapters by catching all lies with correct evidence. Achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state. Score should reflect successful evidence matching and time bonuses.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests random exploration and interaction patterns to ensure the game handles varied player behavior without errors.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Use random movement and interaction inputs during Investigation. Fire Truth Bullets randomly during Class Trials to test miss mechanics and game over conditions.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game should handle all inputs gracefully without crashes. Random play should eventually lead to GAME_OVER_LOSE if lies are missed. No collision or state management errors should occur.
